## Demo impact checklist

- [ ] `DEMO_MODE=true` still works without real API keys.
- [ ] Text chat still completes one turn.
- [ ] This PR does not hardcode a fixed companion name.
- [ ] This PR does not introduce medical diagnosis or medication dosage advice.
- [ ] This PR does not implement real emergency calls, SMS, hospital dispatch, or real caregiver notification.
- [ ] This PR does not call web search / external retrieval for emotional companionship turns.
- [ ] Agent Trace still distinguishes Agent / Tool / Guard when relevant.

## Scope checklist

- [ ] This PR is limited to the related issue or clearly explained slice.
- [ ] This PR does not refactor unrelated files.
- [ ] This PR does not silently change product requirements in docs/00–04.
- [ ] If this PR depends on another PR, the dependency is stated below.
